hub.title: Patient Information | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
hub.description: Everything worth knowing before and after your visit: patient testimonials, answers to common questions and practical guides — from Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, orthopedic specialist with 37 years of experience.

testimonials.title: Patient Testimonials | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
testimonials.description: What patients say about their care with Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko — from shoulder and knee surgery to injections, rehabilitation and second opinions.

faq.title: Patient FAQ | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
faq.description: Referrals and Maccabi, what to bring to the first visit, injections vs. surgery, arthroscopy, recovery timelines and return to sport — answers to patients' most common questions.

articles.title: Articles & Guides for Patients | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
articles.description: Practical guides by Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko: preventing sports injuries, rehabilitation that works, and a safe return to sport after injury or surgery.

sportsInjuryPrevention.title: Preventing Sports Injuries — A Practical Guide | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
sportsInjuryPrevention.description: Proper warm-up, load management, technique, muscular balance, the right footwear and listening to early signals — how to meaningfully reduce the risk of sports injuries.

rehabilitationTips.title: Rehabilitation That Works — Getting the Most Out of It | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
rehabilitationTips.description: Consistency over intensity, realistic phases, sleep and nutrition, working well with your physiotherapist and the warning signs worth reporting — a practical guide to successful rehabilitation.

returnToSport.title: Returning to Sport After Injury or Surgery | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
returnToSport.description: Return by criteria, not by calendar: the functional milestones, gradual load building, mental readiness and preventing re-injury.

maccabi.title: Maccabi Arrangement
maccabi.text: Dr. Dubenko works under an arrangement with the Maccabi health fund — Maccabi members are seen according to their insurance track.

imaging.title: Bring Imaging to the First Visit
imaging.text: X-rays, MRI or ultrasound together with the written reports — a full picture allows a more precise and faster diagnosis.

languages.title: Consultations in Hebrew & Russian
languages.text: The entire visit — from the diagnosis to the explanations — can be held in whichever language is comfortable for you.

testimonials.subtitle: What patients say about the diagnosis, treatment and recovery with Dr. Dubenko.
